prompt: A centered anime-style bust portrait of an androgynous young person facing forward against a clean pale gray-white background. The composition is square and designed like a social media icon. The character has medium-length layered straight hair with a center part, mostly black with glossy deep violet highlights and vivid purple-dyed lower sections and tips. Loose strands frame the face and the hair falls to the shoulders. The face is intentionally obscured by a large soft-edged square blur block in the center, tinted muted mauve-gray, covering the eyes, nose, and most facial features while leaving the jawline and neck partly visible. Show only a small hint of pale skin around the edges of the blur. The visible ear on the right side is decorated with multiple silver piercings, including small hoops, studs, and a dangling cross earring with chain details. The outfit is dark monochrome streetwear with a subtle goth aesthetic: a black high-neck zip-up inner layer fully zipped to the throat, a black oversized semi-gloss jacket layered over it, a black strap with a rectangular metal buckle over one shoulder, and a thin chain accessory over the other shoulder. Add a long silver necklace with a cross pendant hanging at the center of the chest. Lighting is soft and diffuse, with polished digital painting detail and semi-realistic anime rendering. The mood is cool, stylish, slightly mysterious, and alternative. In the background, add sparse minimalist cyber-glitch accents: several thin vertical bars and tiny rectangular pixels in pastel cyan, lavender, magenta, and dark blue scattered around the figure, plus one faint four-point sparkle near the upper right side. Keep the background uncluttered and airy, with the character occupying most of the frame.
